discipline: all three issue numbers verified real + OPEN at duckdb/ducklake before reproduction; versions recorded per arm; verify-don't-assume

arms.title: concurrent inlined and parquet deletes on the same row commit without conflict
arms.evidence: both commit orders: 29 survivors vs 0 expected, no conflict raised

arms.title: CREATE TABLE with >1600 columns fails on Postgres catalog even when data inlining is disabled
arms.kind: operability (wide-schema CREATE blocked by backing-table 1600-col CREATE)
arms.evidence: 1500 cols created=True; 1700 cols (inlining off) -> ERROR:  tables can have at most 1600 columns

arms.title: Connection pool timeout with postgres catalog

duckdb_1.5.2.probe_error: Connection pool timeout: all 14 connections in use, waited 30000ms

headline: 2 of 3 verified-OPEN catalog bugs reproduce on the current stack (DuckDB 1.5.3 + DuckLake e6a3bd0a); the pool-timeout (#1031, labeled 'PR submitted') reproduces on 1.5.2 and is fixed on 1.5.3.
